title: [BUG] Invalid row number in model
author: Diluka
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: 4.4.0 (latest)

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

[example.xlsx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/21959747/example.xlsx) this file is exported by DataGrip / IDEA

```ts
import Excel from 'npm:exceljs';
import path from 'node:path';

const wb = new Excel.Workbook();

await wb.xlsx.readFile(path.join(import.meta.dirname, 'example.xlsx'));
```

## The expected behaviour:

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

load file with no errors


## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

open and resave the file may work

I'm thinking that when reading row and c data, it is assumed to start from A1 and read continuously. If the r attribute is encountered, the r attribute will be used as the basis. If the next grid does not have the r attribute, it will be regarded as the default next position of the previous grid.

comments.author: Diluka
comments.body:
I checked the file and there is no r attribute on the cell data <c>.

created by DataGrip
```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<worksheet xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main">
    <sheetData>
        <row>
            <c t="s">
                <v>0</v>
            </c>
            <c t="s">
                <v>1</v>
            </c>
            <c t="s">
                <v>2</v>
            </c>
        </row>
        <row>
            <c t="n">
                <v>1</v>
            </c>
            <c t="s">
                <v>3</v>
            </c>
            <c t="s">
                <v>4</v>
            </c>
        </row>
    </sheetData>
</worksheet>
```

resaved by wps
```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<worksheet xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main"
    xmlns:r="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships"
    xmlns:xdr="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/spreadsheetDrawing"
    xmlns:x14="http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/spreadsheetml/2009/9/main"
    xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006"
    xmlns:etc="http://www.wps.cn/officeDocument/2017/etCustomData">
    <sheetPr />
    <dimension ref="A1:C2" />
    <sheetViews>
        <sheetView tabSelected="1" workbookViewId="0">
            <selection activeCell="A1" sqref="A1" />
        </sheetView>
    </sheetViews>
    <sheetFormatPr defaultColWidth="10.3846153846154" defaultRowHeight="16.8" outlineLevelRow="1"
        outlineLevelCol="2" />
    <sheetData>
        <row r="1" spans="1:3">
            <c r="A1" t="s">
                <v>0</v>
            </c>
            <c r="B1" t="s">
                <v>1</v>
            </c>
            <c r="C1" t="s">
                <v>2</v>
            </c>
        </row>
        <row r="2" spans="1:3">
            <c r="A2">
                <v>1</v>
            </c>
            <c r="B2" t="s">
                <v>3</v>
            </c>
            <c r="C2" t="s">
                <v>4</v>
            </c>
        </row>
    </sheetData>
    <pageMargins left="0.75" right="0.75" top="1" bottom="1" header="0.5" footer="0.5" />
    <headerFooter />
</worksheet>
```
